text:
The Rising Dragon Tattoo Hide (, Zenshin Irezumi Gawa no Shō Ryū-zu Goku Bihin) is a collectible body part. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

At the Sengi Guild, its agent manages to find three job offers that match Kurapika's request. One of the offers involves a flesh collector seeking the rare item. 

References
